faqs.question: Can I switch plans later?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. If you upgrade, the prorated amount will be charged.

faqs.question: Is there a setup fee?
faqs.answer: No, there are no hidden setup fees. You can start with our Free plan and upgrade only when you need more features. Plus, installation is free if you subscribe before February!

faqs.question: Do I need to buy specific hardware?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. Yummy works on any device with a browser – including iPads, Android tablets, and laptops. We do recommend thermal printers for KOTs.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use bank-grade encryption to protect your data. Your business information is backed up daily and stored securely on cloud servers.

pricing.faqSectionSubtitle: Have questions? We're here to help.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Yummy. Can't find the answer you're looking for?

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards, Esewa, Khalti, and direct bank transfers. For annual plans, we also accept check payments.

questions.question: Can I change my plan later?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Prorated charges will apply automatically.

questions.question: Is there a refund policy?
questions.answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all new subscriptions. If you're not satisfied, just reach out to our support team.

questions.question: Does Yummy work offline?
questions.answer: Yes! Our POS system has an offline mode that allows you to continue taking orders even if your internet connection drops. Data syncs automatically once you're back online.

questions.question: Can I use my own hardware?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Yummy runs on any device with a web browser (iPad, Android tablet, Laptop). We support most standard thermal printers.

questions.question: How many staff accounts can I create?
questions.answer: The Starter plan includes 5 accounts. Pro and Enterprise plans offer unlimited staff accounts with customizable permissions.

questions.question: How secure is my data?
questions.answer: We use bank-grade 256-bit SSL encryption. Your data is backed up daily to secure cloud servers, ensuring you never lose a single order.

questions.question: What kind of support is included?
questions.answer: All plans include email support. Pro and Enterprise plans get priority chat and phone support with dedicated account managers.

posts.title: Top 5 Restaurant Trends in Nepal for 2024
posts.excerpt: The restaurant industry in Nepal is evolving rapidly. From AI-driven menus to sustainable sourcing, discover the future.
posts.metaTitle: Top 5 Restaurant Trends in Nepal 2024 | Yummy POS Blog
posts.metaDescription: Discover the latest restaurant industry trends in Nepal for 2024. From QR menus to cloud kitchens and sustainable sourcing, see what's shaping the future of dining in Kathmandu and beyond.
posts.content:
The culinary landscape in Nepal is undergoing a massive transformation. As we move through 2024, restaurant owners from Kathmandu to Pokhara are adopting new technologies and shifting towards more sustainable practices. Competition is fierce, and staying ahead means evolving with customer expectations.

Here are the top 5 trends defining the Nepalese restaurant industry this year, and how you can leverage them to grow your business.

1. Digital Menus & QR Ordering

Gone are the days of bulky, physical menus that need constant reprinting. QR code menus are becoming the standard in cafes around Thamel, Jhamsikhel, and Lakeside. They offer a hygienic, fast, and interactive way for customers to order, fitting perfectly with the tech-savvy younger generation in Nepal.

2. Integrated POS Systems

Managing a restaurant manually with a calculator and notebook is no longer feasible in a competitive market. Systems like Yummy POS are revolutionizing how businesses handle billing, inventory, and KOTs (Kitchen Order Tokens).

3. Sustainable & Local Sourcing

Nepali diners are becoming more conscious of where their food comes from. Restaurants maximizing the use of organic produce from local farms in Kavre or trusted suppliers in Kalimati are gaining customer loyalty.

4. The Rise of Cloud Kitchens

With the explosion of food delivery apps like Pathao Food and Foodmandu, cloud kitchens (delivery-only restaurants) are expanding rapidly.

5. AI-Driven Personalization

Imagine knowing exactly what your regular customer wants before they even order. Data analytics provided by modern POS systems help restaurant owners understand customer preferences.

posts.title: How to Optimize Your Restaurant Inventory in Nepal
posts.excerpt: Food waste is a profit killer. Learn how smart inventory control can save your business thousands annually.
posts.metaTitle: Restaurant Inventory Management Guide Nepal | Reduce Food Waste
posts.metaDescription: Learn expert tips to optimize your restaurant inventory in Nepal. Cut food waste, automate reordering, and boost profits with smart inventory management strategies.
posts.content:
In the restaurant business, your inventory is your cash sitting on shelves. For many eateries in Nepal, improper inventory management leads to significant profit loss through wastage, spoilage, and even pilferage.

1. Implement a First-In, First-Out (FIFO) System

Ensure that older stock is used before newer shipments. This simple practice is essential for perishable goods like vegetables, dairy, and meat.

2. Use Digital Tracking Tools

Stop relying on manual notebooks that are prone to errors and damage. Digital inventory management tools allow you to track stock levels in real-time.

3. Perform Regular Audits

Even with digital tools, physical checks are vital. Perform spot checks on high-value items like imported liquors or premium meats.

4. Automate Reordering with Low-Stock Alerts

Running out of a key ingredient like onions during a shortage in Kathmandu can be a disaster. Modern POS systems can set automatic low-stock alerts.

posts.title: The Ultimate Guide to QR Menus for Nepali Cafes
posts.excerpt: Contactless ordering is here to stay. Discover the benefits of implementing QR technology in your venue.
posts.metaTitle: QR Code Menu Guide for Nepal Restaurants | Contactless Ordering
posts.metaDescription: Switch to QR code menus for your cafe or restaurant in Nepal. Improve speed, accuracy, and customer satisfaction with our ultimate guide to contactless ordering.
posts.content:
QR code menus have swiftly moved from a pandemic necessity to a standard expectation for convenience.

Why Switch to QR Menus?

  • Speed & Turnover: Guests can scan and order immediately upon seating, significantly reducing wait times during rush hours.
  • Order Accuracy: When customers input their own orders, communication errors are virtually eliminated.
  • Upsell Opportunities: Digital menus can prompt customers to add extra toppings, drinks, or desserts with appealing high-res visuals.

Implementation Tips for Nepal

1. Robust Wi-Fi is Key

Ensure you offer free, reliable Wi-Fi so customers can load the digital menu instantly without frustration.

2. Proper Placement

Make sure your QR codes are placed visibly on every table, perhaps in a durable acrylic stand.

3. Keep a Few Physical Menus

While most young people and tourists prefer digital, older guests might still prefer a physical menu.

posts.title: Boosting Table Turnover Rates Without Rushing Guests
posts.excerpt: Turn tables faster and serve more customers without compromising the famous Nepali hospitality.
posts.metaTitle: Increase Table Turnover Rate | Restaurant Tips Nepal
posts.metaDescription: Maximize revenue by boosting table turnover rates without sacrificing hospitality. Learn efficient service strategies for busy Nepali restaurants.
posts.content:
High table turnover means more revenue, but in a culture that values "Atithi Devo Bhava" (Guest is God), rushing customers is a major faux pas. So how do you balance business efficiency with warm Nepali hospitality?

1. Streamline the Ordering Process

Using handheld POS devices for captains allows orders to be sent to the kitchen instantly from the table side.

2. Serve Efficiently & Together

Train staff to serve dishes immediately when they are ready. Also, try to serve all mains at once so one guest isn't waiting while others eat.

3. Proactive Billing

Drop the bill promptly when the meal is clearly finished. Offering payment at the table via digital wallets speeds this up.

4. Optimize Your Floor Plan

Ensure your floor plan allows for easy movement. A smooth flow usually means faster service and natural turnover.

posts.title: Managing Restaurant Staff Efficiently in Nepal
posts.excerpt: Scheduling, training, and retaining top talent in a competitive hospitality market.
posts.metaTitle: Restaurant Staff Management Guide Nepal | HR Tips
posts.metaDescription: Overcome staff retention challenges in Nepal's hospitality sector. Tips for scheduling, training, and motivating your restaurant team for long-term success.
posts.content:
Staff retention is widely cited as the number one challenge in the Nepali hospitality sector.

1. Clear Communication & Briefings

Regular pre-shift briefings help align the team. Discuss daily specials, out-of-stock items, and any VIP reservations.

2. Tech Empowerment

Give your staff the right tools to succeed. User-friendly tools make their jobs easier, reducing stress and burnout.

3. Invest in Training & Growth

Invest in your staff's future. Teach them about wine pairing, coffee brewing techniques, or customer service excellence.

4. Fair Scheduling

Burnout is real. Ensure shifts are distributed fairly and that overtime is respected or compensated.

posts.title: Reducing Food Waste & Costs in Your Kitchen
posts.excerpt: Practical, eco-friendly tips to save money and the environment.
posts.metaTitle: Reduce Food Waste in Restaurants | Cost Control Tips
posts.metaDescription: Cut costs and help the environment by reducing food waste in your restaurant. Practical tips on portion control, smart purchasing, and menu planning.
posts.content:
Food waste is not just an environmental issue; it's a massive financial leak.

1. Exact Portion Control

Standardize your recipes. Every plate of momo should have the same number of pieces and the same amount of chutney. Use scales and standardized ladles.

2. Creative Use of Scraps

Vegetable trimmings can make excellent vegetable stocks for soups. Day-old bread can become croutons or bread pudding.

3. Smart Purchasing Decisions

Don't overbuy. Analyze your sales reports to predict occupancy. Buying in bulk saves money only if you use it all.

4. Menu Engineering

Identify items that often result in waste because they use unique ingredients not used elsewhere. Try to design a menu where perishable ingredients are used across multiple dishes.
